center.name: 热带雨林
center.summary: 热带雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Silky-tailed nightjar、黑顶蛙口鸱、黑水鸡等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It mainly occurs in lowlands, but has been recorded at altitudes as high as . The Flores hawk-eagle is known to be reliant on tropical rainforest. Most frequently they are seen flying over the canopy over slight slopes of the forest. They are sometimes reported as foraging over cultivations but this is only in areas adjacent to large stretches of forest.{{cite book|author=Coates, B.J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in tropical rainforests, near its preferred habitat of rocky outcrops

birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a variety of landscapes including mature tropical forest, terra firme forest, and lowland tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The western oriole is native to the rainforests of Sierra Leone, Guinea, Liberia, Ivory Coast, Benin, and Ghana. It is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest and adjacent areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Forktail, 91-104. They are found in a range of climates from the temperate woodlands of Nepal to the humid, tropical rainforest of Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Park, Costa Rica]] The spectacled owl is found in Mexico, Central America (Belize, Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama), Trinidad and Tobago, and South America (Colombia, Venezuela, Suriname, French Guiana, Guyana, Paraguay, Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia, Brazil, Argentina). The spectacled owl is primarily a bird of tropical rainforests, being found mostly in areas where dense, old-growth forest is profuse

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crowned eagle inhabits mainly dense woodlands, including those deep within rainforest, but will sometimes also be found in relict patches, wooded escarpments, riparian strips of Acacia, heavily wooded hillsides, and rocky outcrops throughout its range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is distributed across many parts of the Old World, across Africa, Europe, and Asia. It lives around well-vegetated marshes, ponds, canals and other wetlands. The species is not found in the polar regions or many tropical rainforests; generally it is one of the most common Old World rail species, together with the Eurasian coot in some regions

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This arboreal species is an adept of broad leaves of evergreen or mixed coniferous tropical rain forests inside of which it will be found mainly on the middle and lower storeys. It is found in tropical regions of Asia at altitudes ranging from .{{Cite journal|last=T
